Control Description: All user accounts are provisioned through a documented request and approval process
Evidence Required: ServiceNow access request tickets; access provisioning procedure document
Evidence Location / Notes: ServiceNow ticket export available. Procedure document: POL-AC-001 Section 5.1

Control Description: Privileged access accounts use individual named accounts (no shared accounts)
Evidence Required: PAM system report showing zero shared accounts; Active Directory account inventory
Evidence Location / Notes: 14 shared admin accounts remain active (R-001). Report cannot be provided until remediation complete.

Control Description: Multi-factor authentication is enforced for all user and service accounts
Evidence Required: MFA enrollment report from Entra ID; exception log
Evidence Location / Notes: 23 service accounts not MFA-enrolled (R-003). Entra ID report will show gaps.

Control Description: Access reviews are conducted quarterly and completed on time
Evidence Required: Access review completion reports for all four quarters of audit period
Evidence Location / Notes: Q4 2025 completed late (R-007). Q1 2026 review in progress. Q2/Q3 2025 completed on time — reports available.

Control Description: Third-party vendor access is time-limited and supervised
Evidence Required: Vendor access agreements; access logs showing session scope and duration
Evidence Location / Notes: Clearbridge Analytics has standing access (R-004). Access agreement under revision. Current logs show unsupervised access.

Control Description: Encryption at rest is enabled for all storage containing client PII
Evidence Required: Azure storage encryption configuration report; data inventory showing PII locations
Evidence Location / Notes: 3 Azure Blob containers with client PII not encrypted (R-002). Configuration screenshots will show gaps.

Control Description: Audit logs are retained for a minimum of 2 years
Evidence Required: Purview retention policy configuration; sample log export showing date range
Evidence Location / Notes: Current retention: 90 days. Required: 2 years. (R-012). Interim weekly export documented but policy not yet updated.

Control Description: Incident response plan is documented and tested annually
Evidence Required: Incident response policy document; tabletop exercise report from last 12 months
Evidence Location / Notes: Last tabletop: April 2024 — 18 months ago (R-005). Next tabletop scheduled September 2026. No recent test report available.

Control Description: Critical and High vulnerabilities are remediated within defined SLAs
Evidence Required: Penetration test report (November 2025); remediation tracking log; rescan results
Evidence Location / Notes: 2 High findings from November 2025 pen test not yet remediated (R-009). WAF mitigation in place. Full remediation July 2026.

Control Description: All infrastructure changes undergo security review before implementation
Evidence Required: Change management policy; change log showing security review approval for all changes in audit period
Evidence Location / Notes: 3 changes bypassed security review (R-010). Policy revision in progress. Change log evidence will show gaps for those 3 changes.

Control Description: All employees complete mandatory annual security awareness training
Evidence Required: LMS completion report showing 100% (or near 100%) completion
Evidence Location / Notes: Current completion rate: 67% (R-008). Campaign in progress. Completion report will reflect current 67% rate.

Control Description: All data assets are classified and labeled per the data classification scheme
Evidence Required: Data classification policy; Purview sensitivity label report; data inventory
Evidence Location / Notes: ~12000 legacy SharePoint documents unlabeled (R-011). Auto-labeling pilot running. Full coverage not expected before audit.

Control Description: Business continuity plan is documented and reviewed annually
Evidence Required: BCP document with review date; business impact analysis; recovery time objectives
Evidence Location / Notes: BCP last updated 2023 (R-006). Revision in progress. Current version does not reflect cloud architecture. Draft expected August 2026.

Control Description: Data retention schedules are documented and enforced for all data categories
Evidence Required: Data retention policy; evidence of automated retention enforcement (Purview policies); disposal certificates
Evidence Location / Notes: Retention policy POL-DR-001 v2.3 current. Purview retention policies in place for all categories except audit logs (tracked separately as R-012). Disposal certificates available.

Control Description: Terminated employee access is revoked within 24 hours of separation
Evidence Required: HR termination report; access deprovisioning log showing timestamps relative to termination date
Evidence Location / Notes: HR-IT integration via ServiceNow auto-triggers deprovisioning. Last 6-month deprovisioning log available. Average time: 3.2 hours.
